headline: Verizon (VZ) Faces A New Rival If Starlink Launches U.S. Mobile Service
summary: SpaceX is reportedly weighing a Starlink retail mobile internet service in the U.S., which would compete directly with Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ), AT&T, and T-Mobile. Starlink has secured wireless spectrum licenses and may choose to operate its own retail offering rather than rely on existing carrier partnerships. This potential entry could matter most in rural and underserved areas, where Starlink's satellite network may appeal to customers with limited traditional coverage...

headline: Nokia (HLSE:NOKIA) Partners With Nvidia To Build AI RAN 6G Networks
summary: Nokia Oyj (HLSE:NOKIA) announced a partnership with Nvidia to develop an AI RAN 6G platform for future mobile networks. The collaboration includes integrating Nvidia AI processors into Nokia's 5G equipment. Nokia is working with telecom operators such as T-Mobile and Orange on AI powered network use cases. The company has adjusted its network infrastructure sales outlook in connection with this initiative. Nokia Oyj, a long standing supplier of mobile network equipment and related software,...
